---
title: "NYC"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

## Libraries

```{r}

#install.packages('tidyverse')
  library(tidyverse)
#install.packages('dplyr')
  library(dplyr)
#install.packages('gmodels')
  library(gmodels)
#install.packages('readxl')
  library(readxl)
#install.packages('lubridate')
  library(lubridate)
#install.packages('tableone')
  library(tableone)

```

## Dataset

```{r}


```
